title: Sector 36
tmdbOverview: When several children disappear at the hands of a serial killer in Sector 36, a corrupt cop is forced to pursue the chilling case at all costs.
synopsis: Sector 36 (2024) is a crime, thriller and drama film from India. It holds a solid 7.1 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
